CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT TOLAMA, ARACELI RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT VASQUEZ, RAUL A. $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $175.00, PLAINTIFF RETAINED SECURITY DEPOSIT AS OCTOBER RENT, AND WAS NOT ENTITLED TO NOVEMBER OR DECEMBER RENT BY HIS OWN DECISION TO BETTER THE CONDITION OF THE UNIT BEFORE RELETTING. CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF RAUL A. VASQUEZ AND AGAINST ARACELI TOLAMA IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00; CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS $0.00. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, April 7, 2016 in Department 525:
Robert P. Garcia, Esq.,((415) 648-3060) Specially appearance for Respondent/Plaintiff Raul a. Vasquez who is also present.
Jaymee Faith Cadiz Sagisi, Esq.,((415) 773-1240) Specially appearance for Appellant/Defendant Araceli Tolama who is also present with witnesses Luis Maina, Teresa Maina, and Marvin Velasquez. Court appointed Spanish interpreter, Manti Henriquez, who is present for Ms. Tolama.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.
Raul A. Vasquez testifies on his own behalf under direct examination by Mr. Garcia and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (A) - Group exhibits (A - O)- notice to pay rent, lease agreement, Pest control service slip, Proposal, photos.

Araceli Tolama testifies on behalf of herself through Court appointed Spanish interpreter Ms. Henriquez under direct examination by Counsel Sagisi and Ms. Sagisi responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit (1) - Group Exhibits - lease, 8/31/2016 letter, photos, images of checks, e-mails; (exhibits I - O listed in Group exhibits are not accepted into evidence and returned to counsel)
Exhibit (2) - photos.

Witness Luis Maina testifies on behalf of Ms. Tolama under direct examination by Ms. Sagisi.
Ms. Sagisi cross examines Mr. Vasquez on behalf of the appellant/defendant.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly marked evidence is retained.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles. Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Judgment Entered
